description: Accounts on both the recto and verso, early modern. Mentioning a few legible names: Shaʿabān Ḥamāde, Yeḥiʾel Buṣīna, Muḥammad Asbīn[?]. This document is from a larger set of accounts and is related to the neighboring shelfmark ENA 2898.26.
description_he: רשימה או טבלה ביהודית-ערבית. מוחזק בבית המדרש לרבנים.
